outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit features a cozy fleece jacket with heart motifs layered over a simple white top, paired with comfortable floral-patterned sweatpants. Glittery accessories and soft sneakers complete the look, creating a playful yet relaxed daily wear vibe suited for cooler weather.

model_attributes.body: Youthful girl with a petite and natural physique, exuding a cheerful and approachable aura.
model_attributes.pose: Sitting cross-legged facing forward with relaxed shoulders, smiling brightly, expressing comfort and happiness.
model_attributes.background: Soft, pastel-themed fairy-tale setting with clouds, fireworks, marshmallows, and a colorful unicorn.

outfit.P01128003: pink Tut sequined glitter shoulder bag
outfit.P01055351: blue embellished polka-dot denim hair clip
